title: The Night I Stared at 14,000 Rows of Tax Data — and Decided to Automate Everything
content:
The Night I Stared at 14,000 Rows of Tax Data — and Decided to Automate Everything

Every month, the ritual was the same.

Download three reports. Amazon. Flipkart. Meesho.

Open Excel. Wrestle with broken columns.

Cross-reference HSN codes across 22,000 entries.

Manually split CGST and SGST.

Pray the JSON uploads without errors.

One typo in a state code? Rejection.

One missed credit note? Mismatch notice from the GST department.

If you're a CA, a tax consultant, or an e-commerce seller in India — you already know this pain.

That frustration is exactly why I built GSTZap.

Here's every feature we built, and the story behind each one 👇

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🔷 Chapter 1: One Engine, Three Platforms

Here's the dirty secret of e-commerce GST:

No two platforms export data the same way.

→ Amazon gives you a multi-sheet workbook with B2C Small, HSN Summary, and Credit Notes

→ Flipkart buries tax data in nested rows with a separate "Section 13" sheet

→ Meesho splits everything into TCS Sales and TCS Returns with completely different headers

GSTZap's Unified Multi-Platform Engine doesn't care.

Drop any file from any platform — the engine auto-detects which marketplace generated it by analyzing sheet names, column headers, and data patterns.

It normalizes everything into one consistent structure that feeds directly into the GSTR-1 generator.

Zero manual formatting. Zero platform-switching. One engine.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📂 Chapter 2: The Workspace — Your Local Filing Cabinet

When you first open GSTZap, it asks you to bind a local folder on your computer.

This isn't a gimmick — it's the architecture.

Using the File System Access API, GSTZap reads and writes directly to your native OS filesystem. Every calculation, every exported JSON, every Excel summary lands in organized sub-folders.

One per client. One per month. However you want to structure it.

Inside the workspace, you get 4 processing tabs:

✅ GSTR-1 B2C — Table 7 generation

✅ HSN Summary — Table 12 intelligence

✅ Document Issue — Table 13 tracking

✅ Combine JSON — Merge all tables into one master payload

All operating on the same workspace. All your data in one organized place.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📄 Chapter 3: Zero-Error JSON — Ready for the GST Portal

The GST Portal is notoriously picky about JSON format.

A missing field? Rejected.

Wrong data type? Rejected.

Incorrect state code? Rejected. With a cryptic error message.

We reverse-engineered the exact schema from the GST Offline Tool Version 3.2.4 and hardcoded every validation rule.

GSTZap generates 3 distinct table payloads:

📗 Table 7 (B2CS) — All B2C transactions below ₹2.5 lakhs, grouped by state and GST rate. Auto-determines IGST vs CGST+SGST.

📘 Table 12 (HSN Summary) — Transactions grouped by HSN code with exact IGST/CGST/SGST/Cess breakdown. UQC normalization included.

📙 Table 13 (Document Issued) — Invoice number ranges and credit note series extracted across platforms. Total issued, cancelled, and net issued.

And the cherry on top?

The Combine JSON tool. Upload individual table JSONs → GSTZap merges them into one master payload → one file, one upload to the portal.

No more juggling three separate files.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🧠 Chapter 4: The Tax Brain — Automatic IGST vs CGST+SGST

India's GST has a fundamental split:

→ Intra-state = CGST + SGST (split equally)

→ Inter-state = IGST (full amount)

Sounds simple until you're dealing with:

• Thousands of transactions

• 37 state codes

• State name variations ("Uttarakhand" vs "Uttaranchal")

• GSTIN-embedded codes that don't match "Place of Supply"

GSTZap embeds a complete Indian state code mapping:

→ All 28 states + 8 union territories

→ Common alternate spellings

→ Edge cases like "Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu"

→ Resolves from names, codes, GSTIN prefixes, and combined formats

The result?

✅ 37+ state codes mapped

✅ 5 GST rate brackets (0%, 5%, 12%, 18%, 28%)

✅ 100% automatic tax splitting

✅ Paisa-level precision (₹0.01 accuracy)

Zero manual intervention. Every single time.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🔍 Chapter 5: 22,000+ HSN Codes at Your Fingertips

Every GST filing needs correct HSN codes (goods) and SAC codes (services).

Finding the right one? Usually means opening a government PDF and scrolling through hundreds of pages.

Not anymore.

GSTZap embeds the entire HSN/SAC master database — 22,000+ entries — directly in the app.

Features:

🔎 Instant fuzzy search — type any keyword, code fragment, or description

📊 Hierarchical chapter sidebar — HSN (Goods) and SAC (Services) cleanly separated

🏷️ Depth badges — Chapter → Group → Sub-group → Item levels clearly marked

⭐ Bookmark system — save your frequently-used codes

♾️ Infinite scroll — browse all 22,000+ entries without lag

And it's fully offline. Works even when your internet is down.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🧾 Chapter 6: A Full GST Invoice Generator

This isn't just a calculator. It's a complete tax invoice builder.

What you can do:

→ Add unlimited line items with custom quantities and units

→ Apply per-item discounts

→ Toggle tax-inclusive vs tax-exclusive pricing per line

→ Switch between CGST+SGST and IGST mode per item

→ Import items in bulk from Excel (smart column auto-detection)

→ Auto-save seller and bank details locally

And the best part?

10 professional invoice themes:

Classic | Modern Blue | Elegant | Bold | Corporate | Creative | Monochrome | Startup | Retail | Premium

Switch themes in the live preview. Print whichever matches your brand.

Bulk import recognizes dozens of column aliases — "description," "item name," "HSN," "unit price," "rate," "GST %," and more. Just upload your spreadsheet and go.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🔒 Chapter 7: 100% Offline. Zero Data Leaves Your Machine.

This isn't marketing speak. This is the architecture.

All parsing engines (Amazon, Flipkart, Meesho) run entirely in your browser using JavaScript and SheetJS.

→ The File System Access API writes directly to your local folders

→ The HSN database is embedded in the app bundle

→ The GST calculation engine is pure math with zero API calls

The ONLY network requests GSTZap makes:

1. Firebase Auth (for login — optional)

2. Razorpay (for payment — only when upgrading)

Your financial data? It never leaves your RAM.

Disconnect your WiFi. Everything still works.

GSTIN numbers. Invoice amounts. Buyer names. State-wise revenue breakdowns.

None of it touches a third-party server. Ever.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📊 Chapter 8: History, Export & Filing Confidence

Every batch you process is tracked locally.

→ See which files you uploaded

→ Which platforms were detected

→ What the total taxable value was

→ Which workspace folder the results landed in

→ Re-export with one click

Every output supports dual export:

📗 Excel — for human-readable auditing and record-keeping (formatted exactly like the GST offline utility)

📘 JSON — for the GST Portal upload (strict V3.2.4 schema)

For quarterly filers: upload 3 months of data into the same workspace. The aggregation engine handles deduplication and multi-month rollups automatically.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

💰 Chapter 9: Simple Pricing. No Surprises.

🆓 Starter (Free Forever)

→ GST Calculator (CGST/SGST/IGST)

→ 22,000+ HSN/SAC code lookup

→ 14-day full Pro trial on sign-up

👑 Pro Plan

→ ₹499/month or ₹3,999/year (₹333/mo — save 33%)

→ Unlimited file uploads & processing

→ Amazon, Flipkart & Meesho support

→ GSTR-1 JSON export (B2CS, HSN, Doc Issue)

→ Quarterly & monthly filing support

→ Combine multiple JSONs

→ Filing history & dashboard

→ Priority support

14-day free trial. No credit card required. Cancel anytime.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

⚡ The Tech Stack

For the builders who want to know:

→ Next.js 16 (App Router)

→ React 19

→ TypeScript (end-to-end)

→ SheetJS (Excel parsing)

→ Recharts (data visualization)

→ Firebase Auth (authentication)

→ Razorpay (payments)

→ Lucide Icons

→ File System Access API (native OS integration)

→ Vanilla CSS (no bloat)

No unnecessary dependencies. Lean, fast, privacy-first.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

14,000 rows of tax data used to take hours.

Now it takes 2 seconds.

If you're an e-commerce seller, a CA, or a tax consultant who's tired of the monthly GST grind — give GSTZap a try.

🔗 https://gstzap.vercel.app/

No cloud uploads. No data leaks. No stress.

Just upload → process → file. Done.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
